body:
## Implementation summary

Added a Submission Tracker as a third workspace mode (alongside Editor and Corkboard) for tracking query rounds, agent replies, and revision follow-ups.

**New files:**
- `src/types/submission.ts` — SubmissionEntry type, SubmissionStatus, ResponseType
- `src/lib/submissions.ts` — localStorage CRUD: getSubmissions, addSubmission, upsertSubmission, archiveSubmission, deleteSubmission, isOverdue, SUBMISSION_STATUS_LABELS
- `src/components/SubmissionTracker/` — 8 components with CSS modules:
  - `OverdueChip` — grayscale pill chip shown when nextActionDate is past
  - `KpiStrip` — compact Active / Awaiting Response / Overdue / Revisions Requested counts
  - `SubmissionCard` — interactive card with recipient, dates, overdue chip, linked artifact
  - `SubmissionBoard` — 4-column kanban (Drafting → Submitted → Requested Revisions → Closed)
  - `SubmissionTimeline` — chronological week-grouped list view
  - `SubmissionPanel` — right-side slide-over create/edit form drawer with all fields
  - `SubmissionTracker` — top-level wrapper with header, KPI strip, view tab bar, empty state

**Modified files:**
- `src/components/ViewModeSwitch/ViewModeSwitch.tsx` — added `'submissions'` to ViewMode union and a third Submissions button
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` — added submissions branch rendering SubmissionTracker, shared storyTitle state across modes
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.module.css` — added `.submissionsLayout` class

## Branch
`ticket/BIN-96`

## Commits
- `66e61cf` Implement submission tracker for query rounds and agent replies (BIN-96)

## Test evidence
```
$ npm run build
✓ Compiled successfully in 1088ms
✓ Linting and checking validity of types
✓ Generating static pages (6/6)
Route /story/[id]: 22.2 kB
Build: PASS
```

## Known limitations
- No drag-drop between board columns (v1 per Design spec: "optional for v1")
- `linkedArtifactId` is a free-text reference field; no artifact browser yet
- Reminder nudges are visual only (OverdueChip + KpiStrip Overdue count); no push notifications

## Handoff

Assign to: Code Reviewer

## Implementation plan ready — BIN-96

Reviewed codebase, Design brief, and Market Research approval. Plan covers:

- **13 new files**:  type, localStorage CRUD lib, SubmissionTracker + Board + Timeline + Card + Panel + OverdueChip + KpiStrip components (all CSS modules, grayscale tokens only)
- **3 modified files**:  (add  mode),  (add submissions branch),  (add )
- No drag-drop in v1 (per Design feasibility note)
- localStorage key: , consistent with scenes pattern
- Overdue detection: ISO date comparison, timezone-safe
- Acceptance criteria fully mapped in plan

[BIN-96](/BIN/issues/BIN-96)

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-89.
